description.p: We are the exception. We have dementia.

sheet.description: You were born with a simple although tricky ability to swap places with your opponents with a clap.

description.p: At 1st level, you have created a unique technique to switch places with your others, extremely simple yet effective. You can switch places with a willing creature or magical object within 30 feet of you by clapping for 1 Cursed Energy. You can use this technique as an action or bonus action, or you can also swap as a reaction for 2 additional Cursed Energy.

sheet.description: For 1 cursed energy, you can switch places with a willing creature or magical object within 30 feet of you by clapping. You can also swap as a reaction for 2 additional cursed energy.

For 1 cursed energy, you can switch places with a creature or magical object or make two other creature swap places within 30 feet of you by clapping. You can also swap as a reaction for 2 additional cursed energy. Enemies teleported are disorientated and lose their reaction.

For 1 cursed energy, you can switch places with a creature or magical object or make two other creature swap places within 45 feet of you by clapping. You can also swap as a reaction for 1 additional cursed energy. Enemies teleported are disorientated and lose their reaction. You can use Boogie once per turn as a free action.

For 1 cursed energy, you can switch the places of up to 4 creatures or magical object including yourself within 60 feet of you by clapping. You can also swap as a reaction for 1 additional cursed energy. Enemies teleported are disorientated and lose their reaction. You can use Boogie once per turn as a free action. When you switch places with an ally who was previously in melee range of an enemy right before the switch, your next attack roll has advantage. The same goes if you teleport an enemy into range or an ally into range.

description.p: Starting at 3rd level, you have extended the grasp of your technique as well as its versatility. Your Boogie gains the following bonuses:

ul.li: You can make two creatures other than yourself swap places
Enemies teleported are disorientated and lose their reaction

description.p: Beginning at 6th level, “The act of applause is an acclamation of the soul”, you have gained a deeper understanding of your technique and how it can be used, your Boogie gains the following benefits:

ul.li: The Cursed Energy cost is reduced by 1 Cursed Energy for all Boogie Woogie techniques (min cost of 1).
You can use Boogie once per turn as a free action.

description.p: When you reach 11th level, you have understood the true depths of Boogie Woogie, your Boogie gains the following:

ul.li: When you switch places with an ally who was previously in melee range of an enemy right before the switch, your next attack roll has advantage. The same goes if you teleport an enemy into range or an ally into range.
You can use Boogie on up to four creatures at once.

description.p: Reaching 18th level, you have mastered the beat of Boogie Woogie, you gain your domain expansion. Within your domain, you can use Boogie as a free action an unlimited number of times.
You can use Boogie as a free action an unlimited number of times.

element.name: Domain Expansion: Standing Ovation Feature Replacement
